title: Kconfig for LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION and WiFi station
close_reason: Updated Kconfig for LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION (added NET_MGMT selects, default n, improved help) and LICHEN_GATEWAY_WIFI_STATION (generalized, better help referencing spec and AGENTS.md). Fixed parallel-edit reconciliation issues. No compile breakage on scope.
